title: Sisterly support leads to five distinctions
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KWANONQABA NEWS -  One of the most important moments of Sesethu Resha's life was shared with her older sister, Sinesipho.","html":"KWANONQABA NEWS - One of the most important moments of Sesethu Resha's life was shared with her older sister, Sinesipho."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sesethu was announced as the second of Indwe Secondary School's top matric learners of 2025, her sister proudly standing by her side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2025's matric learners in Mossel Bay and throughout South Africa received their National Senior Certificate results on Tuesday 13 January.","html":"2025's matric learners in Mossel Bay and throughout South Africa received their National Senior Certificate results on Tuesday 13 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Achieving five distinctions after dealing with personal challenges at home, which the sisters chose not to share, made Sesethu's matric year even more stressful than usual.","html":"Achieving five distinctions after dealing with personal challenges at home, which the sisters chose not to share, made Sesethu's matric year even more stressful than usual."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Resha sisters told Mossel Bay Advertiser the moment brought some relief after the difficult year they had endured, one they are grateful they could share with each other.","html":"The Resha sisters told Mossel Bay Advertiser the moment brought some relief after the difficult year they had endured, one they are grateful they could share with each other."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sesethu Resha and Indwe Secondary’s principal, Ntsikelelo Ngcenge. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Sesethu Resha and Indwe Secondary’s principal, Ntsikelelo Ngcenge. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Like many matriculants, Sesethu is planning on pursuing higher education outside of Mossel Bay. She will be studying data science at the University of Cape Town this year.","html":"Like many matriculants, Sesethu is planning on pursuing higher education outside of Mossel Bay. She will be studying data science at the University of Cape Town this year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Indwe Secondary has achieved a pass rate of 85.7%."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ntsikelelo Ngcenge, the principal, told both the parents and learners awaiting to receive their results that the learners had pushed themselves and achieved results they should be proud of.","html":"Ntsikelelo Ngcenge, the principal, told both the parents and learners awaiting to receive their results that the learners had pushed themselves and achieved results they should be proud of."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Indwe Secondary is located in KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay.","html":"Indwe Secondary is located in KwaNonqaba, Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
